content.full_text:
110 Cook Circle
Vallejo, California 94589
September 14, 1992

Mr. John Vallea
Fair Political Practice Commission
428 J Street
Sacramento, CA 95814

Dear Mr. Vallea:

Your name was referred to me by the Attorney General's office in reference to my Query. Request that you provide necessary information to me for disposal of Surplus Campaign funds.

I am a member of the Valley City Unified School District Board of Governers. I was elected in NOV. 1985, and reelected in 1989. My term expires in 1993. Presently I have about $2,100.? in campaign funds.

Thank you.

Jerry W. Elliot
707-643-5043

sections.question: Request that you provide necessary information to me for disposal of surplus campaign funds.
sections.question_synthetic: Henry W. Elliott, a school board member with approximately $2,100 in campaign funds, requests guidance on the proper procedure for disposing of surplus campaign funds.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: This is an incoming request to FPPC, not an FPPC response/advice letter. The document contains a clear question section but no conclusion section. The second portion of the document appears to be corrupted or extraneous text with illegible handwritten content from an unrelated 1963 source that was inadvertently included in the provided text.

embedding.summary: This is an incoming request letter from Henry W. Elliott, a Vallejo City Unified School District Board member, to the FPPC asking for information on how to properly dispose of approximately $2,100 in surplus campaign funds from his 1989 re-election campaign.
